summary: Enable CPython 3.12-style reference counting in Mamba JIT codegen (#1129). Three specs implemented: (1) closure-release-fix: mb_closure_release now cascade-releases captured values, func, and defaults to prevent use-after-free; (2) gc-reenable: GcState.enabled set to true, KI-1 resolved; (3) jit-refcount-enable: EMIT_REFCOUNT_CALLS=true, all borrowed-reference runtime functions have retain_if_ptr, conformance test un-ignored. GC collect() restructured with two-pass (release-contained then drop) to prevent cyclic double-free.
